title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: A YouTube tutorial explaining AWS Identity and Access Management fundamentals in under 10 minutes. Covers the bouncer mental model, users vs. roles vs. policies, least privilege principles, IAM Access Analyzer, and security best practices like avoiding access keys in code.
